selected_track: Data Science / ML / AI (Sponsor API Track)
reasoning: ZerveHack has the highest strategic weight: sponsor API track (★★★★★) means we MUST use Zerve platform, which filters out lazy entries. Judges are Zerve's own founders = we build exactly what showcases their platform best. $10K prize across just 3 positions with ~145 estimated submissions. Judging criteria favor Analytical Depth (35%) and End-to-End Workflow (30%) = deploy as API/app for maximum score. 20-day timeline is comfortable.

project_idea.name: PredictPulse
project_idea.tagline: AI-powered prediction market intelligence — turning crowd wisdom into actionable accuracy scores
project_idea.problem: Prediction markets handle $1B+ in volume annually, yet 68% of participants lack tools to assess forecast reliability. No existing tool cross-references market data with external signals to predict which forecasts are actually trustworthy.
project_idea.solution: PredictPulse uses the Zerve platform to build an end-to-end data science pipeline that analyzes prediction market accuracy by cross-referencing market metadata with economic indicators and social signals, then deploys an AI-powered API that scores any prediction's reliability.
key_features: Cross-Platform Intelligence: Ingests prediction data from Metaculus and correlates with FRED economic indicators and Google Trends to identify accuracy patterns
AI Accuracy Scorer: ML model trained on historical prediction outcomes predicts which current forecasts are likely to be accurate, with Claude-powered natural language explanations
Deployed API: Live API endpoint that accepts a prediction topic and returns an accuracy analysis with confidence score and reasoning
project_idea.demo_flow: User enters a prediction market question → PredictPulse fetches relevant market data → cross-references with economic/social signals → ML model generates accuracy score → Claude produces human-readable analysis explaining why this prediction is likely reliable or unreliable → results returned via API
project_idea.pitch_angle: Judges are Zerve founders who want to see their platform used for genuine, insightful data science. We showcase Zerve's full stack: AI agent for data discovery, notebooks for analysis, and deployment for production API. The narrative focuses on 'turning prediction market noise into signal' with real statistical rigor.

submission_requirements.public_zerve_project_url: Required - must be error-free and shareable
submission_requirements.text_description: ~300 words covering: question asked, findings, significance
submission_requirements.social_post: LinkedIn or X with project link, @Zerve tag
